patterns.name: single-class Tkinter app
patterns.description: BlindBoxExtractor owns state, widgets, extraction commands, history handling and expression enhancement helpers.

patterns.name: UI variables referenced by command handlers
patterns.description: extract(), clear_input(), copy_to_clipboard() and expression actions read widgets stored on self; UI migration should preserve attribute names.

patterns.name: verified expression pure logic
patterns.description: enhance_expression_text() and helpers can stay unchanged; only expression widget placement needs migration.

integration_points.description: Window title, geometry, style initialization and top-level layout are created here.
Existing blind box / animal controls should move into a dedicated workspace builder.
Existing Toplevel controls should move into a main-window workspace builder.
Documentation should describe the new two-workspace UI after implementation.

conflict_areas: 内容抽取.py setup_ui and open_expression_window are actively changing from previous expression-window work
Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md currently documents expression extraction as independent Toplevel
workflow artifacts are untracked WIP and should be treated as intentional
constraints: Keep Chinese UI and local Tkinter app
Do not change blind box / animal comma input syntax
Do not change expression enhancement output behavior
Do not add third-party UI dependencies in first pass
Do not expose independent expression Toplevel as the default interaction
